testcase.name: Heap should present the currently largest number on io.root while ready and not empty

failure.message: io_root=251 (0xfb) did not equal expected=250 (0xfa) (lines in HeapTest.scala: 41, 13)

testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: io_root=251 (0xfb) did not equal expected=250 (0xfa) (lines in HeapTest.scala: 41, 13) at chiseltest.internal.TestEnvInterface.signalExpectFailure(TestEnvInterface.scala:60) at chiseltest.internal.TestEnvInterface.signalExpectFailure$(TestEnvInterface.scala:45) at HeapTest.signalExpectFailure(HeapTest.scala:8) at chiseltest.package$Utils$.expectFailed(package.scala:531) at chiseltest.package$Utils$.expectBits(package.scala:522) at chiseltest.package$testableUInt.expectInternal(package.scala:60) at chiseltest.package$testableUInt.expect(package.scala:63) at HeapTest.$anonfun$new$3(HeapTest.scala:41) at HeapTest.$anonfun$new$3$adapted(HeapTest.scala:13) at chiseltest.internal.GenericBackend.$anonfun$run$1(GenericBackend.scala:170) at chiseltest.internal.ThreadedBackend$TesterThread$$anon$1.$anonfun$run$1(ThreadedBackend.scala:495) at chiseltest.internal.GenericBackend.doTimescope(GenericBackend.scala:104) at chiseltest.internal.ThreadedBackend$TesterThread$$anon$1.run(ThreadedBackend.scala:495) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) Caused by: chiseltest.internal.FailedExpectException: io_root=251 (0xfb) did not equal expected=250 (0xfa) (lines in HeapTest.scala: 41, 13) ... 14 more

testcase.name: Heap should not change the stored values
Heap should assert empty after all numbers have been removed
Heap should assert full when 8 numbers have been inserted
Heap should deassert full after one number is removed when it was full
Heap should not change the sequence if new insertions are issued when it is full
